[Uploading index.html…]()
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-Hant">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>怡璟 AI 自動化 ｜ 重複的事情免手動，自動化找怡璟</title>
<meta name="description" content="怡璟 AI 流程自動化顧問。專注 Google Apps Script、LINE 官方帳號、Notion 與 AI 工具串接，協助中小企業與電商把重複的工作交給系統，讓人專注在更重要的事。">
<meta name="keywords" content="AI自動化,流程自動化,Google Apps Script,LINE Bot,Notion,接案,自動化顧問,怡璟">
<meta property="og:title" content="怡璟 AI 自動化 ｜ 重複的事情免手動，自動化找怡璟">
<meta property="og:description" content="把重複的工作交給系統，讓人專注在更重要的事。AI 流程自動化顧問。">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Zen+Maru+Gothic:wght@500;700;900&family=Noto+Sans+TC:wght@400;500;700;900&family=Baloo+2:wght@600;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root{
  --cream:#FCEFE1;          /* 與插圖完全相同的背景米色 */
  --cream-deep:#F6E3CF;
  --card:#FFFDF8;
  --ink:#4E3B2A;            /* 插圖手寫棕 */
  --ink-soft:#7A6450;
  --line:#06C755;           /* LINE 綠 */
  --line-dark:#04A847;
  --sheet:#2E9E5B;          /* Google Sheet 綠 */
  --leaf:#9CC95B;           /* 水彩淺綠 */
  --pink:#F4A0A0;
  --pink-soft:#FBD5D0;
  --yellow:#FBD15B;
  --orange:#EE9A53;
  --border:#EAD9C2;
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{
  font-family:"Zen Maru Gothic","Noto Sans TC",sans-serif;
  background:var(--cream);
  color:var(--ink);
  line-height:1.85;
  -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  overflow-x:hidden;
}
/* 顆粒柔光底紋，讓純色背景有水彩層次 */
body::before{
  content:"";position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:-1;pointer-events:none;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 12% 18%, rgba(156,201,91,.10), transparent 38%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 88% 12%, rgba(244,160,160,.12), transparent 36%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 78% 82%, rgba(251,209,91,.12), transparent 40%);
}
.wrap{max-width:1040px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 22px}
h1,h2,h3{font-family:"Zen Maru Gothic","Noto Sans TC",sans-serif;line-height:1.4;letter-spacing:.5px}
a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}
.latin{font-family:"Baloo 2","Zen Maru Gothic",sans-serif}

/* ---------- 裝飾元件 ---------- */
.wave{display:block;width:160px;height:12px;margin:10px auto 0}
.wave path{stroke:var(--leaf);stroke-width:5;fill:none;stroke-linecap:round}
.heart{position:absolute;font-size:22px;animation:float 5s ease-in-out infinite;opacity:.85;pointer-events:none}
@keyframes float{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(-4deg)}50%{transform:translateY(-12px) rotate(4deg)}}
.spark{position:absolute;pointer-events:none;opacity:.9}

/* ---------- 導覽列 ---------- */
header{
  position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50;
  background:rgba(252,239,225,.82);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);
  border-bottom:2px dashed var(--border);
}
nav{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;height:64px}
.brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;font-weight:900;font-size:19px}
.brand .dot{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--line);
  display:grid;place-items:center;color:#fff;font-size:15px;box-shadow:0 3px 0 var(--line-dark);transform:rotate(-6deg)}
.navlinks{display:flex;gap:26px;font-weight:700;font-size:15px;color:var(--ink-soft)}
.navlinks a{position:relative;transition:color .2s}
.navlinks a:hover{color:var(--line-dark)}
.nav-cta{background:var(--line);color:#fff;padding:8px 18px;border-radius:999px;font-weight:900;
  font-size:14px;box-shadow:0 4px 0 var(--line-dark);transition:transform .15s}
.nav-cta:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)}
.burger{display:none;font-size:26px;cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;color:var(--ink)}
@media(max-width:760px){
  .navlinks{display:none}
  .burger{display:block}
}

/* ---------- Hero ---------- */
.hero{position:relative;text-align:center;padding-bottom:40px}
.hero-band{display:block;width:100%;max-width:760px;margin:0 auto;margin-bottom:-12px}
.hero-card{position:relative;max-width:720px;margin:0 auto;padding:6px 20px 8px}
.eyebrow{display:inline-block;background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--leaf);color:var(--sheet);
  font-weight:700;font-size:14px;padding:5px 16px;border-radius:999px;margin-bottom:18px;
  box-shadow:0 3px 0 rgba(156,201,91,.4)}
.hero h1{font-size:clamp(30px,7vw,52px);font-weight:900;letter-spacing:1px}
.hero h1 .g{color:var(--sheet)}
.hero h1 .l{color:var(--line)}
.hero .lead{font-size:clamp(16px,3.8vw,20px);color:var(--ink-soft);font-weight:500;margin-top:14px;max-width:560px;margin-inline:auto}
.tagbar{display:inline-block;margin-top:22px;background:var(--yellow);color:var(--ink);
  font-weight:900;font-size:clamp(15px,3.6vw,18px);padding:8px 22px;border-radius:14px;
  transform:rotate(-1.2deg);box-shadow:4px 4px 0 rgba(238,154,83,.45)}
.cta-row{display:flex;gap:14px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:30px}
.btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-weight:900;font-size:16px;
  padding:13px 26px;border-radius:999px;transition:transform .15s,box-shadow .15s;cursor:pointer;border:none}
.btn-line{background:var(--line);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 5px 0 var(--line-dark)}
.btn-line:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 8px 0 var(--line-dark)}
.btn-ghost{background:#fff;color:var(--ink);border:2.5px solid var(--ink);box-shadow:0 5px 0 var(--border)}
.btn-ghost:hover{transform:translateY(-3px)}

/* ---------- 區塊通用 ---------- */
section{padding:64px 0;position:relative}
.sec-head{text-align:center;margin-bottom:44px}
.sec-head .kicker{font-weight:700;color:var(--leaf);letter-spacing:3px;font-size:13px}
.sec-head h2{font-size:clamp(26px,5.5vw,38px);font-weight:900;margin-top:6px}
.sec-head h2 .hl{background:linear-gradient(transparent 62%, var(--yellow) 62%);padding:0 4px}

/* About */
.about{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:26px;max-width:760px;margin:0 auto}
.about p{font-size:17px;color:var(--ink-soft)}
.about .strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:700}
.belief{background:var(--card);border:2px dashed var(--leaf);border-radius:22px;padding:24px 28px;
  position:relative}
.belief b{color:var(--sheet)}

/* Services grid */
.grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:20px}
.card{background:var(--card);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:22px;padding:26px 24px;
  transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s;position:relative}
.card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:0 14px 0 -4px rgba(156,201,91,.25)}
.card .ic{width:54px;height:54px;border-radius:16px;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:26px;
  margin-bottom:14px;box-shadow:0 4px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.06)}
.card h3{font-size:19px;font-weight:900;margin-bottom:4px}
.card .csub{font-size:13px;color:var(--sheet);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:12px;line-height:1.5}
.card ul{list-style:none;font-size:14.5px;color:var(--ink-soft)}
.card li{padding:3px 0 3px 20px;position:relative}
.card li::before{content:"›";position:absolute;left:4px;color:var(--leaf);font-weight:900}
.ic-1{background:#E5F5EA;color:var(--sheet)} .ic-2{background:#FFF3D6;color:var(--orange)}
.ic-3{background:#E0F8EA;color:var(--line)} .ic-4{background:#FCE3E3;color:var(--pink)}
.ic-5{background:#EEF3DC;color:#7FA838}

/* Tools section (with blocks image) */
.tools{background:var(--cream-deep);border-radius:36px;margin:0 14px}
.tools-inner{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:36px;align-items:center}
.tools-img{width:100%;max-width:420px;border-radius:24px;display:block;margin:0 auto}
.chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-top:22px}
.chip{background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:999px;padding:7px 15px;
  font-size:13.5px;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink-soft);transition:transform .15s}
.chip:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);border-color:var(--leaf);color:var(--sheet)}
@media(max-width:760px){.tools-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:22px} .tools-img{max-width:320px}}

/* Cases */
.cases{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(250px,1fr));gap:20px}
.case{background:var(--card);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:22px;padding:24px;
  transition:transform .2s;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.case:hover{transform:translateY(-5px)}
.case .tag{display:inline-block;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;background:var(--line);
  padding:3px 12px;border-radius:999px;margin-bottom:12px}
.case .tag.g{background:var(--sheet)} .case .tag.o{background:var(--orange)} .case .tag.p{background:var(--pink)}
.case h3{font-size:18px;font-weight:900;margin-bottom:8px}
.case .cmd{font-family:"Baloo 2",monospace;background:var(--cream);border:1.5px dashed var(--leaf);
  border-radius:10px;padding:6px 12px;font-size:14px;color:var(--sheet);font-weight:700;display:inline-block;margin-bottom:10px}
.case p{font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-soft)}
.case-feature{grid-column:1/-1;background:var(--card);border:2.5px dashed var(--pink);border-radius:26px;
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 320px;gap:24px;align-items:center;padding:28px;overflow:hidden}
.case-feature img{width:100%;max-width:300px;border-radius:18px;justify-self:center}
.case-feature h3{font-size:22px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.case-feature .sub{color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:15px;margin:8px 0 14px}
.case-feature ul{list-style:none}
.case-feature li{padding:4px 0 4px 26px;position:relative;font-size:15px}
.case-feature li::before{content:"💕";position:absolute;left:0}
@media(max-width:760px){.case-feature{grid-template-columns:1fr;text-align:center}.case-feature ul{text-align:left;max-width:300px;margin:0 auto}}

/* Why me */
.why{max-width:720px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px}
.why .item{background:var(--card);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:16px 18px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;font-weight:700;font-size:15.5px}
.why .ck{min-width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--line);color:#fff;
  display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:16px;box-shadow:0 3px 0 var(--line-dark)}
@media(max-width:560px){.why{grid-template-columns:1fr}}

/* Audience */
.aud{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;justify-content:center;max-width:760px;margin:0 auto}
.aud span{background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--leaf);border-radius:999px;padding:10px 20px;
  font-weight:700;color:var(--sheet);font-size:15px;box-shadow:0 4px 0 rgba(156,201,91,.3)}

/* Philosophy */
.philo{text-align:center;max-width:720px;margin:0 auto}
.philo .q{font-size:clamp(22px,5vw,34px);font-weight:900;line-height:1.6}
.philo .q .hl{color:var(--sheet)}
.philo .sign{margin-top:24px;font-size:clamp(18px,4vw,24px);font-weight:900;color:var(--line)}

/* Contact */
.contact{text-align:center}
.contact-card{max-width:560px;margin:0 auto;padding:14px 24px 8px;position:relative}
.contact-btns{display:flex;gap:26px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:nowrap}
.cbtn{width:78px;height:78px;display:grid;place-items:center;
  transition:transform .18s}
.cbtn img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;
  filter:drop-shadow(0 6px 10px rgba(120,90,60,.22))}
.cbtn:hover{transform:translateY(-6px) rotate(-3deg)}
@media(max-width:480px){.cbtn{width:62px;height:62px}.contact-btns{gap:20px}}

footer{text-align:center;padding:40px 0 50px;color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:14px;border-top:2px dashed var(--border)}
footer .fb{font-weight:900;color:var(--ink);font-size:16px;margin-bottom:6px}

/* reveal animation */
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(26px);transition:opacity .7s ease,transform .7s ease}
.reveal.in{opacity:1;transform:none}

/* mobile menu */
.mmenu{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;padding:8px 22px 18px;background:rgba(252,239,225,.96);border-bottom:2px dashed var(--border)}
.mmenu.open{display:flex}
.mmenu a{padding:10px;font-weight:700;border-radius:10px}
.mmenu a:hover{background:#fff}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<header>
  <nav class="wrap">
    <a href="#top" class="brand">怡璟 AI 自動化</a>
    <div class="navlinks">
      <a href="#about">關於</a>
      <a href="#services">服務</a>
      <a href="#cases">案例</a>
      <a href="#why">優勢</a>
      <a href="#contact">聯絡</a>
    </div>
    <a href="https://lin.ee/V6GXgVb" target="_blank" class="nav-cta">＋ 加 LINE</a>
    <button class="burger" aria-label="選單" onclick="document.getElementById('mm').classList.toggle('open')">☰</button>
  </nav>
  <div class="mmenu" id="mm">
    <a href="#about">關於</a><a href="#services">服務</a><a href="#cases">案例</a>
    <a href="#why">優勢</a><a href="#contact">聯絡</a>
  </div>
</header>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero" id="top" style="padding-top:18px">
  <span class="heart" style="left:8%;top:30%;color:var(--pink)">♥</span>
  <span class="heart" style="right:9%;top:24%;color:var(--leaf);animation-delay:1.5s">♥</span>
  <span class="heart" style="left:14%;top:60%;color:var(--yellow);animation-delay:.8s">✦</span>
  <img class="hero-band" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="怡璟 AI 自動化 兩位角色探頭打招呼">
  <div class="hero-card">
    <span class="eyebrow">AI 流程自動化顧問</span>
    <h1>把重複的工作，<br>交給 <span class="g">系統</span> 自動完成</h1>
    <p class="lead">協助企業將日常繁瑣、重複的工作交給系統完成，<br>讓團隊把時間留給真正重要的事情。</p>
    <div class="tagbar">重複的事情免手動，自動化找怡璟</div>
    <div class="cta-row">
      <a href="https://lin.ee/V6GXgVb" target="_blank" class="btn btn-line">💬 加 LINE 聊聊你的流程</a>
      <a href="#services" class="btn btn-ghost">看看怡璟能做什麼 →</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <svg class="wave" viewBox="0 0 160 12"><path d="M4 8 Q24 0 44 8 T84 8 T124 8 T156 6"/></svg>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="sec-head reveal">
      <div class="kicker">ABOUT ME</div>
      <h2>嗨，這裡是<span class="hl">怡璟</span></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="about reveal">
      <p>怡璟專注於企業 <span class="strong">AI 流程自動化</span>，協助企業把日常繁瑣、重複的工作交給系統完成，讓團隊把時間留給真正重要的事情。</p>
      <p>怡璟擅長將 <span class="strong">Google Workspace、LINE 官方帳號、Notion</span> 與 AI 工具串接，打造符合企業需求的工作流（Workflow），讓資訊自動流動，而不是靠人工搬運。</p>
      <div class="belief">
        💡 怡璟相信：真正的效率，不是工作做得更快，<b>而是讓工作可以按照自己的要求自動完成。</b>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SERVICES -->
<section id="services">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="sec-head reveal">
      <div class="kicker">SERVICES</div>
      <h2>怡璟提供的<span class="hl">服務</span></h2>
      <svg class="wave" viewBox="0 0 160 12"><path d="M4 8 Q24 0 44 8 T84 8 T124 8 T156 6"/></svg>
    </div>
    <div class="grid">
      <div class="card reveal">
        <div class="ic ic-1">⚙️</div>
        <h3>AI 流程自動化</h3>
        <p class="csub">那些每天重複做的事，讓系統自己跑</p>
        <ul>
          <li>重要的信一進來，團隊馬上收到提醒、不漏接</li>
          <li>收到的附件自己歸檔，不用一個個下載存檔</li>
          <li>每天的報表自動整理好、傳到 LINE</li>
          <li>客人填的表單直接進試算表，不用手動複製</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="card reveal">
        <div class="ic ic-2">📝</div>
        <h3>Apps Script 開發</h3>
        <p class="csub">把 Excel 和手動作業，變成按一下就完成</p>
        <ul>
          <li>試算表自己算、自己更新，不用人工維護</li>
          <li>信件自動寄出、檔案自動分類整理</li>
          <li>報表定時自己跑，月底不用熬夜趕</li>
          <li>量身做一個只給你用的小後台</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="card reveal">
        <div class="ic ic-3">💬</div>
        <h3>LINE 官方帳號整合</h3>
        <p class="csub">客人傳 LINE，系統自動回、自動記錄</p>
        <ul>
          <li>24 小時自動回覆，不用一直盯手機</li>
          <li>重要通知主動推播到你的 LINE</li>
          <li>在 LINE 打一句話，就寫進試算表</li>
          <li>接上 AI，回覆更聰明更自然</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="card reveal">
        <div class="ic ic-4">🔗</div>
        <h3>Google Workspace 整合</h3>
        <p class="csub">Gmail、表單、試算表之間，資料自己流動</p>
        <ul>
          <li>信件、文件、檔案集中管理不散落</li>
          <li>表單、行事曆、通知全部串在一起</li>
          <li>各工具資料自動同步，不用人工搬</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="card reveal">
        <div class="ic ic-5">🤖</div>
        <h3>AI Agent 與 Workflow</h3>
        <p class="csub">讓 AI 幫你讀信、整理、分類、回覆</p>
        <ul>
          <li>AI 自動讀信、抓重點、寫摘要</li>
          <li>AI 幫你分類資料、建議怎麼回</li>
          <li>多個工具串成一條龍，自己跑完</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TOOLS -->
<section>
  <div class="tools wrap" style="padding:46px 30px">
    <div class="tools-inner">
      <img class="tools-img reveal" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Gmail、LINE、Sheets、Drive、Docs、Notion 工具方塊">
      <div class="reveal">
        <div class="sec-head" style="text-align:left;margin-bottom:18px">
          <div class="kicker">TOOLS</div>
          <h2 style="font-size:clamp(24px,5vw,32px)">你常用的工具，<br>其實都能變成<span class="hl">好朋友</span></h2>
        </div>
        <p style="color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:16px">把這些工具串接起來，資料就能自動流動。以下是怡璟常用的整合積木：</p>
        <div class="chips">
          <span class="chip">Apps Script</span><span class="chip">LINE Messaging API</span>
          <span class="chip">Google Sheets</span><span class="chip">Gmail</span>
          <span class="chip">Google Drive</span><span class="chip">Google Docs</span>
          <span class="chip">Google Chat</span><span class="chip">Notion</span>
          <span class="chip">ChatGPT</span><span class="chip">Gemini</span>
          <span class="chip">Webhook</span><span class="chip">REST API</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CASES -->
<section id="cases">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="sec-head reveal">
      <div class="kicker">CASE STUDIES</div>
      <h2>怡璟做過的<span class="hl">案例</span></h2>
      <svg class="wave" viewBox="0 0 160 12"><path d="M4 8 Q24 0 44 8 T84 8 T124 8 T156 6"/></svg>
    </div>
    <div class="cases">
      <div class="case reveal">
        <span class="tag">LINE × Sheet</span>
        <h3>一句話記帳</h3>
        <div class="cmd">牛肉麵 150</div>
        <p>自動解析內容、建立日期、寫入 Google Sheet，並回覆確認訊息。</p>
      </div>
      <div class="case reveal">
        <span class="tag">LINE × 庫存</span>
        <h3>LINE 庫存管理</h3>
        <div class="cmd">補貨 20</div>
        <p>即時更新庫存、自動寫入 Sheet，庫存不足時主動通知。</p>
      </div>

      <!-- feature case -->
      <div class="case-feature reveal">
        <div>
          <h3>情侶求生系統 <span style="font-size:20px">😂</span></h3>
          <p class="sub">女友說過的話不一定記得，但忘記的代價很高 —— 怡璟都幫你記起來。</p>
          <ul>
            <li><b>餐廳收藏：</b>「這家好像不錯吃」自動收藏，之後問「今天吃什麼？」立刻給清單</li>
            <li><b>紀念日提醒：</b>生日 / 情人節 / 交往紀念日提前提醒，並推薦過去收藏的餐廳</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="情侶求生系統清單：餐廳、景點、喜好、紀念日">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- WHY -->
<section id="why">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="sec-head reveal">
      <div class="kicker">WHY ME</div>
      <h2>為什麼選<span class="hl">怡璟？</span></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="why">
      <div class="item reveal"><span class="ck">✓</span>客製化需求，不套模板</div>
      <div class="item reveal"><span class="ck">✓</span>不只寫程式，更協助規劃流程</div>
      <div class="item reveal"><span class="ck">✓</span>熟悉 Google Workspace 生態系</div>
      <div class="item reveal"><span class="ck">✓</span>擅長 LINE 官方帳號整合</div>
      <div class="item reveal"><span class="ck">✓</span>AI Workflow 規劃</div>
      <div class="item reveal"><span class="ck">✓</span>持續研究最新 AI 與自動化技術</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- AUDIENCE -->
<section>
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="sec-head reveal">
      <div class="kicker">FOR WHOM</div>
      <h2>適合<span class="hl">哪些人？</span></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="aud reveal">
      <span>中小企業</span><span>電商</span><span>行政團隊</span><span>業務團隊</span>
      <span>新創公司</span><span>個人工作室</span><span>想導入 AI 的企業</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PHILOSOPHY -->
<section>
  <div class="wrap philo reveal">
    <p class="q">AI 不是取代人，<br>而是把重複、浪費時間的事交給<span class="hl">怡璟</span>。</p>
    <p class="sign">重複的事交給怡璟，時間留給自己 ♡</p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact" class="contact">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="sec-head reveal">
      <div class="kicker">CONTACT</div>
      <h2>聊聊你的<span class="hl">工作流程</span></h2>
      <p style="color:var(--ink-soft);margin-top:8px">也許不用換工具，就能開始自動化。</p>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-card reveal">
      <div class="contact-btns">
        <a href="https://lin.ee/V6GXgVb" target="_blank" class="cbtn" aria-label="LINE"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="LINE"></a>
        <a href="https://www.instagram.com/apps.script" target="_blank" class="cbtn" aria-label="Instagram"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Instagram"></a>
        <a href="https://www.threads.com/@apps.script" target="_blank" class="cbtn" aria-label="脆 Threads"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Threads"></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div class="fb">怡璟 AI 自動化</div>
  重複的事情免手動，自動化找怡璟 · LINE @503whmpq
</footer>

<script>
/* 捲動淡入 */
const io=new IntersectionObserver((es)=>{es.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.classList.add('in');io.unobserve(e.target)}})},{threshold:.12});
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach((el,i)=>{el.style.transitionDelay=(i%4*0.08)+'s';io.observe(el)});
/* 點手機選單後關閉 */
document.querySelectorAll('.mmenu a').forEach(a=>a.addEventListener('click',()=>document.getElementById('mm').classList.remove('open')));
</script>
</body>
</html>
